pageDescription: Calculate the percentage error between an estimated value and the actual value

definition.title: Percentage Error Definition
definition.description: Percentage error measures the discrepancy between an estimated value and the actual value as a percentage

formula.title: Calculation Formula
formula.description: Percentage Error = (|Estimated Value - Actual Value| / Actual Value) × 100%

applications.title: Real-world Applications
applications.description: Used in science experiments, engineering measurements, and quality control to assess accuracy

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides percentage error calculations only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual error may vary based on measurement accuracy and methodology

importantNotesList: Percentage error is always expressed as a positive value
A smaller percentage error indicates higher accuracy
The actual value should not be zero to avoid division by zero
Results help assess the reliability of measurements or estimates

messages.enterInformation: Enter your estimated and actual values to calculate percentage error
messages.resultMessage: Your percentage error calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides percentage error calculations based on standard mathematical formulas. Actual error values may vary based on measurement accuracy, methodology, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Mathematics Resources
seekHelp.content: For advanced error analysis and statistical methods, consult mathematics textbooks or academic resources on numerical analysis and measurement theory.

errors.estimatedValue: Please enter a valid estimated value
errors.actualValue: Please enter a valid actual value

tooltips.estimatedValue: The value you estimated or calculated
tooltips.actualValue: The true or accepted value for comparison

calculate_the_percent_error_between_a_me: Calculate the percent error between a measured value and an actual value instantly.
to_see_the_percent_error_instantly_28: to see the percent error instantly.
